qa_pairs.question: What kind of service is Nextcloud for Alliance users?
qa_pairs.answer: Nextcloud is a Dropbox-like cloud storage service provided for all Alliance users.

qa_pairs.question: How do Alliance users log in to the Nextcloud server?
qa_pairs.answer: Alliance users can log in to the Nextcloud server using their Alliance username and password.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Alliance Nextcloud server?
qa_pairs.answer: The Nextcloud server URL is https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Nextcloud user manual?
qa_pairs.answer: A complete Nextcloud user manual is available from the official Nextcloud documentation at https://docs.nextcloud.com/, and a PDF version is also available under your account once you connect.

qa_pairs.question: Are data transfers between local devices and Alliance's Nextcloud encrypted?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, all data transfers between local devices and Alliance's Nextcloud are encrypted.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended dataset size for the Nextcloud service?
qa_pairs.answer: The Nextcloud service is aimed at users with relatively small datasets, up to 100 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What service is recommended for datasets larger than 100 GB?
qa_pairs.answer: For anything larger than 100 GB, the Globus service is recommended.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a demo available for Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if you are not familiar with Nextcloud, you may try the demo on the Nextcloud website at https://try.nextcloud.com/.

qa_pairs.question: What data management practices are recommended for Nextcloud users?
qa_pairs.answer: Users are recommended to review and clean up their data, remove unneeded files, and check their data sharing settings.

qa_pairs.question: What is the server location for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The Nextcloud server is located at Simon Fraser University in Burnaby, BC.

qa_pairs.question: What is the fixed storage quota per user for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The fixed quota for Alliance Nextcloud is 100 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the backup policy for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The backup policy for Alliance Nextcloud is daily backup without an offsite copy.

qa_pairs.question: What are the available methods to access Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Access methods include the Web interface, Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client, Nextcloud mobile apps, and any WebDAV client.

qa_pairs.question: How do I use the Nextcloud web interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To use the web interface, log in to Alliance Nextcloud from a web browser using your Alliance username and password.

qa_pairs.question: What functions can I perform using the Nextcloud web interface?
qa_pairs.answer: You can upload and download files, edit files, and share files with other Alliance users using the web interface.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I download the Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client or mobile apps?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client or Nextcloud mobile apps from https://nextcloud.com/install/.

qa_pairs.question: What happens when I install the Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client or mobile apps?
qa_pairs.answer: Once installed, the software will synchronize everything between your Nextcloud folder and your local folder.

qa_pairs.question: What is the WebDAV URL for mounting a Nextcloud folder?
qa_pairs.answer: The WebDAV URL for mounting a Nextcloud folder is https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/remote.php/webdav/.

qa_pairs.question: How do I mount a Nextcloud folder on Mac OSX using a WebDAV client?
qa_pairs.answer: On Mac OSX, select Go -> Connect to the Server, enter the WebDAV URL for the Server Address, and click Connect, then log in with your username and password.

qa_pairs.question: How do I mount a Nextcloud folder on Windows using a WebDAV client?
qa_pairs.answer: On Windows, use the 'Map Network Drive ...' option, select a drive letter, and then use the WebDAV URL https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/remote.php/webdav/ in the Folder field.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any alternative WebDAV clients for OSX and Windows?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Cyberduck is available for OSX and Windows, and you may consider using it or other clients.

qa_pairs.question: Where can Linux users find recommendations for WebDAV applications?
qa_pairs.answer: Linux users should consult the Nextcloud user manual for recommendations on WebDAV applications.

qa_pairs.question: What is the difference in how WebDAV clients and synchronization clients handle files?
qa_pairs.answer: WebDAV clients mount your Nextcloud storage directly, so files are not copied locally; you edit the original file on the server. Synchronization clients, however, copy and synchronize files between the Nextcloud system and your local computer, ensuring files are the same everywhere.

qa_pairs.question: What is an advantage of using a synchronization client over a WebDAV client?
qa_pairs.answer: An advantage of using a synchronization client is that you can work on files offline, and they will be synchronized once network connectivity is re-established.

qa_pairs.question: What is a potential drawback of using a synchronization client?
qa_pairs.answer: Synchronization can take a lot of time when files are changed frequently, especially if multiple collaborators are involved.
